description:
Want to make money and save time with AI? Join here: https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Video notes + links ot the tools 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Get a FREE AI Course + Community + 1,000 AI Agents 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-with-julian-goldie-1553/about

Build Full Apps Autonomously with Kimi K2.6 & Open Code

Discover how the Kimmy K2.6 model inside Open Code functions as a fully autonomous coding agent that plans, builds, and fixes software independently. Learn how to leverage these agentic workflows to create production-ready landing pages and automation systems for your business.

00:00 - Intro: The Power of Autonomous AI
01:12 - How Agentic Coding Models Work
02:12 - Kimi K2.6 Benchmarks vs. Claude Sonnet
03:53 - Real Example: Building a Landing Page
05:20 - Automating Content Pipelines
06:18 - How to Prompt for Best Results
07:08 - The Future of AI Development

chapters.title: Intro: The Power of Autonomous AI
Kimi K2.6 Benchmarks vs. Claude Sonnet
Real Example: Building a Landing Page
How to Prompt for Best Results
